title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a runtime-validated public data adapter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.
Build parsers that return typed values or structured failure paths rather than booleans that discard evidence.
Handle required, optional, deprecated, defaulted, and versioned fields with changed-schema fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
